alias.description: Known aliases used by the wanted subject.

api-source.description: Source API endpoint used to retrieve this entry.

build.description: Physical build of the wanted subject.

caution.description: Caution statement published on the wanted poster.

dates-of-birth-used.description: Date(s) of birth used by the wanted subject.

details.description: Additional details from the wanted entry.

eyes.description: Eye color of the wanted subject.

field-office.description: FBI field office(s) associated with the wanted entry.

files.description: FBI URL(s) to downloadable files related to the entry.

hair.description: Hair color of the wanted subject.

images.description: Image URL(s) from the wanted entry.

languages.description: Language(s) spoken by the wanted subject.

legal-name.description: Legal name listed in the FBI wanted entry.

modified.description: Last modification time of the wanted entry.

ncic.description: National Crime Information Center (NCIC) classification in the FBI entry.

occupations.description: Known occupation(s) of the wanted subject.

path.description: Relative FBI path of the wanted entry.

person-classification.description: Person classification published by the FBI.

place-of-birth.description: Place of birth of the wanted subject.

publication.description: Publication date and time of the wanted entry.

race.description: Race listed in the FBI wanted entry.

remarks.description: Remarks listed on the wanted entry.

reward-text.description: Reward details announced for the wanted subject.

scars-and-marks.description: Scars and marks listed for the wanted subject.

sex.description: Sex listed in the FBI wanted entry.

subjects.description: Subject category assigned by the FBI.

title.description: Title of the FBI wanted entry.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the FBI wanted entry.

url.description: Direct URL to the FBI wanted entry.

warning-message.description: Warning message highlighted in the wanted entry.

description: FBI Most Wanted entry as published by the FBI Wanted API v1.
